title: vesalea subcoriacea var. spinosa
intro: Vesalea subcoriacea var. spinosa is a variant of the Vesalea subcoriacea plant, commonly known as the prickly vesalea, which belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Vesalea subcoriacea var. spinosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots and leaves are often dried and used in traditional medicine.
